info.title: Index API
info.description: This is the REST api for [Index](https://index-it.app)

get.summary: gets a user by its email

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: the encoded email of the user

404.description: user with the provided email not found

delete.summary: deletes an user by its email

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: the encoded email of the user

404.description: user with the provided email not found

get.summary: verifies the email on behalf of a user

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: the encoded email of the user

404.description: user with the provided email not found

get.summary: gets a user by its id

404.description: user with the provided id not found

delete.summary: deletes an user by its id

409.description: user with the provided email already exists

post.summary:
sends a verification email to the email of the user
sends a verification email to the user, unless the user is rate limited on this endpoint
tells if an email has been verified

404.description: for sure not verified, might be not found neither

get.summary: verifies the email via the token received in the email

307.description: redirects to either a success or failure page

get.summary:
google oauth login
the user needs to get an id token with google oauth and forward it to this endpoint to get authenticated via google

parameters.name: token_id
parameters.description: the id token received from google

get.summary:
apple oauth login
the user needs to get an id token with apple oauth and forward it to this endpoint to get authenticated via apple

parameters.name: token_id
parameters.description: the id token received from apple

post.summary:
register with an email and password
a user can register with an email and password and will be able to login only after email verification

200.description: user registered, an email has been sent for verification

201.description: user registered, no email has been sent (for rate limiting reasons) but it still might be needed to verify the email

get.summary:
retrieve the required first step for a user auth flow
this is used to initialize a user auth flow

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: the encoded email of the user

get.summary: Kubernetes startup probe
Kubernetes readiness probe
Kubernetes liveness probe
gets all categories of a list
gets a single category

delete.summary: deletes a category and all the items and item contents inside it

put.summary: completes or un-completes an item and a related task if existing

parameters.name: completed
parameters.description: true for completed, false for un-completed

get.summary: gets the content of an item; if the content doesn't yet exist it gets created

put.summary: updates the content of an item

get.summary: gets a single item

delete.summary: deletes an item and its content

get.summary: gets all the items of a list

parameters.name: completed
parameters.description: completed filter: true means only completed, false only uncompleted, null or missing means all

post.summary: creates a new item in a list

put.summary: move items to a different list

get.summary: gives informations about the users that have access to the list

200.description: info about the users that have access to the list

post.summary: invites a user to have access to a list or changes his permissions if he was already added

200.description: user already had permissions and they were updated successfully

400.description: you cannot invite yourself to a list

delete.summary: removes access to a user from the list

get.summary:
removes the user from the viewers or editors of the list
the user will be removed from the viewers or editors of the list

405.description: the owner cannot leave the list

get.summary:
accepts a list invitation via a token
a user can accept a list invitation via a token that is sent via email when he is invited

405.description: you need to have an account to accept this invitation

get.summary: gets a single list

402.description: pro required for lists to be public

delete.summary: deletes a list and all of its content (categories, items and item contents)

get.summary: gets all the lists the user has access to

402.description: pro required in order to have more than 10 lists and for lists to be public

get.summary: restores a user subscription if it is somehow missing in the Index system

204.description: user status is already up to date

get.summary: gets color suggestions
gets list name suggestions

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: ISO 639 set 1 language code, `en` by default

get.summary: gets category name suggestions

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: ISO 639 set 1 language code, `en` by default

get.summary: gets item name suggestions

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: ISO 639 set 1 language code, `en` by default

get.summary: gets task name suggestions

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: ISO 639 set 1 language code, `en` by default

get.summary: gets a list template

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: ISO 639 set 1 language code, `en` by default

get.summary: gets a category template

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: ISO 639 set 1 language code, `en` by default

get.summary: gets an item template

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: ISO 639 set 1 language code, `en` by default

get.summary: gets a task template

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: ISO 639 set 1 language code, `en` by default

put.summary: completes or un-completes a task and a related item if existing

parameters.name: completed
parameters.description: true for completed, false for un-completed

get.summary: gets a single task

402.description: pro required to have multiple reminders

404.description: task or item to connect not found

405.description: cannot set an rrule for a task connected to an item (cannot make task recurrent if connected to an item)

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: only useful when a task is recurrent: true for deleting all occurrences, false to keep recurrent tasks

get.summary: gets all the tasks of a user with an optional completion filter

parameters.name: completed
parameters.description: completion filter: true only completed, false only uncompleted, null or missing means all

402.description: pro required to have multiple reminders

404.description: did not find the item provided for connection with this new task

post.summary: saves a user device notification token

get.summary: terminates the auth session
get the logged in user data

delete.summary: delete the logged in user account and all their data (irreversible)

200.description: user data deleted and session terminated

put.summary: changes the password of the user

400.description: password doesn't conform to rules, see response message

get.summary:
request a password reset email
will send an email with instructions on how to reset the password, this is subject to rate limits as with all email operations

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: the encoded email of the user

post.summary:
reset the password via an auth token
a user can reset its password via a token that is sent via email when he requests it

400.description: password doesn't conform to rules, see response message

get.summary: adds the user email to the newsletter for the alpha release
receives webhooks for task reminder jobs
receives webhooks for actions that should be executed daily (cleaning up expired db data for example)
